name: Smart Partner API Usage Monitoring with Slack, Jira & Gmail Alerts

parameters.content:
## Incoming Partner Usage Data
This section receives incoming partner API usage data through a webhook and validates the payload structure and values. It ensures only correctly formatted and meaningful usage data is allowed to move forward in the workflow.

## Analyze API Usage Levels
This section calculates the partner’s API usage percentage based on allowed limits and checks whether the usage has crossed the defined alert threshold. It decides whether the situation requires internal review or no action.

## 90% Usage Alert – Internal Review Trigger
When API usage crosses 90% of the allocated quota, this section escalates the alert by creating a Jira ticket along with a Slack notification. It ensures internal teams initiate a formal review process and prepare for potential partner communication or plan adjustments.

## How workflow works
 - Webhook receives partner API usage data (quota, consumed, partner details)
 - Payload is validated to ensure required fields are correct
  - Usage percentage is calculated from quota vs consumed
 - Switch node routes flow based on thresholds (80%, 90%, 100%)
 - 80%: Sends Slack alert for early warning
 - 90%: Sends Slack alert + creates Jira ticket for review
 - 100%: Sends Slack + Jira + Email for critical escalation
 - Ensures timely alerts, tracking and action to prevent service issues

## Setup and Configuration Steps

- Create webhook node to accept usage data
- Add Code node to validate payload fields
 - Add Code node to calculate usage percentage
 - Configure Switch node for 80%, 90%, 100% conditions
 - Set up Slack node for notifications
- Set up Jira node for ticket creation
- Set up Gmail node for critical alerts
 - Add credentials for all integrations (Slack, Jira, Gmail)
- Test with sample data to verify all scenarios
- Deploy workflow after successful testing

parameters.message:
==

🚨 API Usage Limit Reached

Partner Name: {{$json["partner_name"]}}

Partner ID: {{$json["partner_id"]}}

Plan: {{$json["plan"]}}

Quota: {{$json["quota"]}}

Consumed: {{$json["consumed"]}}

Usage: {{Math.round($json["usage_pct"])}}%

Timestamp: {{$json["timestamp"]}}

⚠ Recommended Action

  • Immediately review partner usage
  • Contact partner for plan upgrade
  • Prevent service disruption

This is an automated alert from API Monitoring System
parameters.subject: == URGENT: {{$json["partner_name"]}} has reached 100% API usage limit

parameters.content:
## 80% Usage Alert – Early Warning Notification
This section monitors when a partner reaches 80% of their API usage quota. It acts as an early warning system by sending a Slack notification to internal teams, enabling proactive monitoring and giving sufficient time to assess usage trends before critical limits are reached.

## 100% Usage Alert – Critical Escalation & Action Required
This section handles critical scenarios where a partner fully exhausts their API quota. It triggers immediate escalation by sending an email, creating a Jira ticket and notifying via Slack, ensuring rapid response to prevent service disruption and initiate urgent upgrade or mitigation actions.
